title: bidens neumannii
intro: Bidens neumannii, also known as Neumann's beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Bidens neumannii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
